summary: Decent front‑of‑house recording using a high‑quality AMS ST‑250 mic setup; no musical commentary provided.
review: The sole review is a technical rundown of the recording chain – an AMS ST‑250 microphone in Blumlein pattern feeding a modified Sony DAT machine via a Cool‑Lux stand – indicating a front‑of‑house (audience) capture. The reviewer gave it three stars, suggesting an average listening experience: solid gear but nothing that makes the tape stand out dramatically. No comments on performance, setlist flow, or individual band members are present.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, technical review with a mid‑range star rating; insufficient data on musical quality, so rating reflects average recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house mic capture using AMS ST‑250 in Blumlein pattern; professional gear noted but no explicit praise or criticism of clarity, balance, or noise.
